metrics.name: latency_ms_p95
metrics.purpose: Track execution latency against the packaged SLO.

metrics.name: qa_score
metrics.purpose: Keep final quality inside the packaged minimum.

metrics.name: irr_alpha
metrics.purpose: Monitor inter-rater reliability for governance and promotion.

notes: The baseline is evaluated by the client stack after installation.
Packaged governance uses the baseline as a promotion and anomaly input.
